approval_note: Operator approved this exact 25-symbol pilot list for Cloud Data Pilot v1.
data_source_note: Operator approved Binance public klines as the Phase 2A baseline OHLCV source for Cloud Data Pilot v1. This approval is for public historical candle collection only; it does not approve exchange credentials, private endpoints, optimizer production, or trade execution.
description: Approved 25-symbol pilot universe for Cloud Data Pilot v1.
exclusion_note: Operator explicitly rejected these replacement symbols for Cloud Data Pilot v1. Do not include them in the pilot universe unless separately re-approved.
